text.text:
*Summary*
Test brief: routing, rendering, and delivery are now aligned so the morning lane can carry one crisp leadership scan instead of mixed operational noise.

fields.text:
*Security*
• Security guardrails and recurring review jobs were added to reduce prompt-injection and secret-leak risk.
• Gateway and health reporting now route into dedicated operational lanes with failure alerts separated cleanly.

*Platform / Vendor*
• Slack routing was reworked so briefing, outage, health, and admin updates land in distinct channels.
• Block Kit templates were normalized into a consistent visual family with cleaner hierarchy and spacing.

text.text:
*MSP Impact*
Lower channel clutter, faster scanning, and cleaner operational separation for daily decisions.

*Recommended Action*
• Confirm the daily brief lands at the right time for your morning routine.
• Keep outages and failures in their dedicated lanes to preserve signal quality.
• Expand channel routing only after the core set feels calm and useful.
